subcodes.first_line: Peace be upon God's sincere servants! O thou who inquireth, verily I have heard all that thou didst write unto Me in thy letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. و السلام على عباد الله المخلصین فیا ایها السآئل قد سمعت کل ما کتبت الی فی کتابک
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @outward and inward meanings
